description: This Rust source file defines a configuration structure and functions for creating a cryptographic signer used in a signing process. It includes handling of default certificates, environment variables, and path management, along with unit tests for the configuration logic.

classes.name: SignConfig
classes.description: Configuration structure for signing parameters, including algorithm, key paths, and certificate paths.

methods.name: from_json
methods.description: Creates a SignConfig instance from a JSON string.

methods.name: set_base_path
methods.description: Sets a base path for relative key and certificate paths.

methods.name: signer
methods.description: Constructs and returns a Signer object based on the configuration, using default or provided keys and certificates.
